# Interactive Petrophysics

**Summary**: An electrical survey method that measures the ability of a material to polarize in response to an electric field.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-badhafere|Badhafere, 2023]] used IP as the foundational theory for developing SIP measurements.

## Key Results and Findings

- Identified as more effective than standard resistivity for distinguishing between minerals with similar conductivity but different mineralogy. ([[2023-badhafere|Badhafere, 2023, p. 21]])
